name: Karthik at Veerabhadra Auto
text: Karthik is a very sincere boy. He is always on the floor. He helps me with production tracking. Every evening he updates it and sends it to me on WhatsApp. He doesn't really push back. If I tell him to do something, he does it.

name: Meena at Lakshmi Textiles
text: Meena spends too much time on her laptop. But I must say, she built that order tracker that flag delays. She also analyzed our rejection rate and found out why it goes up on Mondays. She needs to talk more to the workers though.
